text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 2 

ALZH_DEMEN 

LABEL: Alzheimer's Disease and Related Disorders or Senile Dementia End-of-Year Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Condition Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
Alzheimer's disease and related disorders or senile dementia as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: ALZHDMTA 

LONG NAME: ALZH_DEMEN
